rationale: Wrap the proof in an `if` matching the ensures antecedent (so both runs' postconditions are in scope), then show `r1 == r2` by case-splitting on the order of the two insert positions: in each WLOG branch, sortedness of one post-state forces `k < pre[smaller]` while sortedness of the other forces `pre[smaller] < k`, contradicting `cmp_properties`'s asymmetry; finally Seq extensionality lifts `i1 == i2` to `post1_self_@ == post2_self_@`.
